  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Deposit Mobilization Officer",
  "description": "Retrust Microfinance Bank was officially launched in 2024 during the Annual Thanksgiving Ceremony of Zylus Group, of which the Bank is a proud subsidiary. The establishment of the Bank represents the Group&rsquo;s strategic commitment to expanding financial inclusion and providing accessible banking solutions to individuals, entrepreneurs, and growing businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Deposit Mobilization Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the job


	We are seeking an experienced Deposit Mobilization Officer to join our team.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for mobilizing deposits and investments from individual and corporate leads, identifying new business opportunities, expanding the business network, and building relationships with existing customers to grow the bank&rsquo;s deposit portfolios.


Responsibilities


	Mobilize financial deposits from individual and corporate customers
	Identify new business opportunities and build relationships with existing customers
	Grow deposit portfolios through effective sales and marketing strategies
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis to stay informed about market trends
	Develop and maintain relationships with key stakeholders, including customers, colleagues, and partners
	Meet and exceed deposit mobilization targets
	Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements and internal policies
	Ensure SOP on KYC is duly followed in all transactions.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree, Higher National Diploma in a relevant field
	3+ years of experience in deposit mobilization and HNI transactions in the Financial Sector.
	Proven track record of achieving deposit and investment targets
	Strong understanding of financial products and services
	Excellent communication, sales, and marketing skills
	Ability to build relationships with customers and stakeholders
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;Careers@retrustmfb.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as subject of email.",

Deposit Mobilization Officer Job at Retrust Microfinance Bank




        
    

        
        Retrust Microfinance Bank was officially launched in 2024 during the Annual Thanksgiving Ceremony of Zylus Group, of which the Bank is a proud subsidiary. The establishment of the Bank represents the Group’s strategic commitment to expanding financial inclusion and providing accessible banking solutions to individuals, entrepreneurs, and growing businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Deposit Mobilization Officer

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the job
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an experienced Deposit Mobilization Officer to join our team.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for mobilizing deposits and investments from individual and corporate leads, identifying new business opportunities, expanding the business network, and building relationships with existing customers to grow the bank’s deposit portfolios.


Responsibilities


	Mobilize financial deposits from individual and corporate customers
	Identify new business opportunities and build relationships with existing customers
	Grow deposit portfolios through effective sales and marketing strategies
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis to stay informed about market trends
	Develop and maintain relationships with key stakeholders, including customers, colleagues, and partners
	Meet and exceed deposit mobilization targets
	Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements and internal policies
	Ensure SOP on KYC is duly followed in all transactions.


Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree, Higher National Diploma in a relevant field
	3+ years of experience in deposit mobilization and HNI transactions in the Financial Sector.
	Proven track record of achieving deposit and investment targets
	Strong understanding of financial products and services
	Excellent communication, sales, and marketing skills
	Ability to build relationships with customers and stakeholders
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of email.
